name: @alexsun-top/office2pdf
description: Node-first TypeScript bindings for office2pdf via Rust/WASM.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run wasm:build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && npm run wasm:copy && npm run bin:chmod
scripts.test:real: npm run build && vitest run tests/real-conversion.test.ts
scripts.test:smoke:installed: npm run build && npm run smoke:installed
scripts.wasm:build: (command -v wasm-pack >/dev/null 2>&1 && wasm-pack build rust --target nodejs --out-dir ../wasm/pkg --release --no-opt) || npx --yes wasm-pack build rust --target nodejs --out-dir ../wasm/pkg --release --no-opt
scripts.wasm:copy: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist/wasm',{recursive:true}); const source='wasm/pkg/office2pdf_wasm.js'; fs.copyFileSync(source, 'dist/wasm/office2pdf_wasm.cjs'); fs.copyFileSync('wasm/pkg/office2pdf_wasm.js','dist/wasm/office2pdf_wasm.js'); for (const file of ['office2pdf_wasm_bg.wasm','office2pdf_wasm.d.ts','office2pdf_wasm_bg.wasm.d.ts']) fs.copyFileSync('wasm/pkg/'+file, 'dist/wasm/'+file)"
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run test:real && npm run format:check
